title: Replace with human-readable title
document_type: contract | complaint | motion | order | letter | other
notes: Short description of why this case is included in the eval set.

executive_summary: Key fact or takeaway expected in the executive summary.
key_obligations: Important duty, obligation, or legal requirement that should appear.
deadlines_and_time_sensitive_items: Important date, deadline, notice period, or timing issue.
legal_risks_and_exposure: Expected claim, defense, liability issue, or compliance risk.
missing_facts_or_clarifying_questions: A reasonable follow-up question the model should surface.

immediate_next_steps: Urgent attorney action expected from the summary.
filing_or_procedure_steps: Procedural follow-up the model should recommend.
evidence_or_document_requests: Document or evidence request the model should identify.
client_questions: Question the attorney should ask the client.
risk_monitoring: Deadline or exposure item that should be monitored.

must_not_do: Invent parties not present in the source
Invent deadlines not present in the source

coverage.description: Important obligations, deadlines, and risks are included.

hallucination_control.description: The output avoids invented facts and overreach.

format_compliance.description: The output follows the requested section structure and bullet constraints.

attorney_usefulness.description: The output is practically helpful for legal review.
